title: The rod of power
description: The legendary rod of power. Has a power that you can't even imagine.
body:
**O-HOO-HOO!**

What is this?! I can't believe... This.. this is...

![**LEGENDARY ROD OF PO-O-OWE-E-ER!!!**](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/wRv7Ebsi/images/a09cfd67fe5fd8735428ddee7ba486a4c02c3b60.png)

Do you even know how powerful this artifact is?! **NO?!!?!** Unbelievable!


Okay, now let's talk seriously.
---

This resourcepack transforms an ordinary boring trident into.. into.. in..

**THE LEGENDARY ROD OF PO-O-OWE-E-ER!!!**

And nothing else :D

# Requirements

This resourcepack require **[OptiFine](https://optifine.net/home)** or **[OptiFabric](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/optifabric)**
